story.text: **Aletheia.** The Silent Messenger (Tale 3). The bright medium — Fiat-Shamir as protocol. 🔮 First canonical complement-pair partner with Lethe (38).

## On the lattice

- **Complement** (bnot = 63 − 25 = 38): [[Artefact 38 — Lethe]] — everything this blade is not.
- **Successor** (the dihedral walk `neg(bnot(x)) = succ(x)`): [[Artefact 26 — Unnamed]].
- Forged in [[The Workshops]] — each shop instances one or more of these six dimensions at its vertex.
